subcodes.first_line: O ye believing handmaidens! In all lowliness and contrition do I supplicate unto the Kingdom of the All-Glorious, the Almighty, the All-Compelling [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الستات المومنات انی بکل ذل و انکسار ابتهل الی ملکوت العزیز الجبار خافض
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
